entry:
Here's what I can do:
- my <thing> is <value> - teach me a fact (e.g. my name is Erik)
- what is my <thing> - ask me about a fact you taught me
- facts / what do you know about me - list everything you've taught me
- remember <something> - ask me to save a note
- recall / what do you remember - see recent memories
- hi / hello / hey - greet me
- how are you - ask how I'm doing
- what is your name / who are you - ask who I am
- bye / exit / quit - stop the conversation
- help - show this message
Got it, I'll remember that your name is what.
